C[norman.richards: that big center definitely was key this game
C[Tom Newman: Sorry about not saying hello earlier. Was playing on my phone. Have a good game.
C[norman.richards: Is there an app?  Or do you just use the phone's browser?
Tom Newman: Both. The app is alpha but getting close to beta. If you have a Google account send mature a note with your email address.
C[Tom Newman: sorry - sent matburt an email address.  Darn autocorrect
C[Tom Newman: Not sure how the pass happened. I was playing on the phone app.
C[norman.richards: strange - I didn't see any way to offer an undo.  (new to the site)

Tom Newman: When analysis is enabled you can request an undo, and for this tournament it isn't available. Even so, all the features aren't enabled in the app yet. Not sure it would have helped as far behind as I am.
C[norman.richards: I think it's actually quite close
C[Tom Newman: Did I give up on the ko threat too easily?
Tom Newman: I'm not sure it would have made a difference.  Thought you had more threats than I did.
Tom Newman: Thank you very much for the game.
Tom Newman: Hope we can do it again some time soon.
norman.richards: I wasn't sure, but I had the count as even on the board
Tom Newman: I felt good that I didn't loose any large groups.  It helps to have a handicap!

C[norman.richards: Hmm.  I'm not sure why the game didn't get properly handicapped.
norman.richards: Well, let's have fun nonetheless... :)
C[hyperpape: Seems that default is no handicap.
hyperpape: I like non-handicap games, though four stones is a big gap.

C[norman.richards: I used to feel that way until I started taking lessons from a stronger player who helped me understand the value of handicapped games.  Now I strongly prefer taking handicap stones as black because it's a chance for me to learn something from a game

norman.richards: But of course, you also face the situation where white is not used to playing handicapped games and feels he has to make really big overplays and use trick plays to try and win.  Those kinds of games will not be fun for either player.
norman.richards: strange. when I type T-R-I-C-K it replaces the word with symbols
